title: Thumbs Up Emoji: Copy & Paste 👍 👎 Approval Combos
meta_description: Copy and paste the thumbs up emoji 👍 in every skin tone, plus thumbs down 👎, OK hands, and approval combo sets for chats. Click any emoji to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Thumbs up, thumbs down, and every approval gesture in between — click any emoji to copy it instantly.
intro: The thumbs up emoji 👍 is the internet's default sign of approval, agreement, and "sounds good." This library collects the thumbs up and thumbs down emojis in every skin tone, the wider family of approval gestures like 👌 and 🤝, and the check marks that pair with them in polls, replies, and reviews. Grab a single character or copy a ready-made approval combo set in one click.
